title: Metpalli Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Metpalli with a Z-Score of +7.06. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Metpalli is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 23.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 20%, and the wind speed is 12.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The Heat Wave is expected to continue, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) forecasted, indicating no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
